max-pc-count.name: Maximum Player Characters
max-pc-count.hint: The maximum number of player characters to display in the sidebar.

sidebar-scale.name: UI Scale
sidebar-scale.hint: Adjust the size of the party sidebar portraits.

hp-estimate.name: Use HP Estimates
hp-estimate.hint: Show health status (e.g., Injured) instead of exact numbers.

hp-label-unharmed.name: Unharmed Label
hp-label-unharmed.hint: The label to display when a character is unharmed.

hp-color-unharmed.name: Unharmed Color
hp-color-unharmed.hint: The color of the health bar for unharmed characters.

hp-label-fine.name: Fine Label
hp-label-fine.hint: The label to display when a character is fine.

hp-color-fine.name: Fine Color
hp-color-fine.hint: The color of the health bar for characters that are fine.

hp-threshold-fine.name: Fine Threshold
hp-threshold-fine.hint: The HP percentage at which a character is considered fine.

hp-label-scratched.name: Scratched Label
hp-label-scratched.hint: The label to display when a character is scratched.

hp-color-scratched.name: Scratched Color
hp-color-scratched.hint: The color of the health bar for scratched characters.

hp-threshold-scratched.name: Scratched Threshold
hp-threshold-scratched.hint: The HP percentage at which a character is considered scratched.

hp-label-injured.name: Injured Label
hp-label-injured.hint: The label to display when a character is injured.

hp-color-injured.name: Injured Color
hp-color-injured.hint: The color of the health bar for injured characters.

hp-threshold-injured.name: Injured Threshold
hp-threshold-injured.hint: The HP percentage at which a character is considered injured.

hp-label-wounded.name: Badly Wounded Label
hp-label-wounded.hint: The label to display when a character is badly wounded.

hp-color-wounded.name: Badly Wounded Color
hp-color-wounded.hint: The color of the health bar for badly wounded characters.

hp-label-dead.name: Dead Label
hp-label-dead.hint: The label to display when a character is dead or unconscious.

hp-color-dead.name: Dead Color
hp-color-dead.hint: The color of the health bar for dead characters.

hide-conditions.name: Hide Conditions
hide-conditions.hint: If enabled, condition icons will not be displayed next to the portraits.

highlight-color.name: Highlight Color
highlight-color.hint: The color of the border when a character is selected or hovered.

actor-filter.name: Filter Actors by Name
actor-filter.hint: Only show actors whose names match this comma-separated list. If empty, all owned characters on the scene are shown.

show-background.name: Show Sidebar Background
show-background.hint: If enabled, a dark gradient background will be shown behind the party sidebar.

theme-style.name: HUD Theme Style
theme-style.hint: Choose the layout and style of the party HUD.

persona-glow-strength.name: Persona Glow Intensity
persona-glow-strength.hint: Adjust the brightness and spread of the white glow effect in persona mode.

persona-stagger.name: Stagger Persona HUD
persona-stagger.hint: If enabled, character portraits will be staggered horizontally in a staircase pattern. If disabled, they will be perfectly vertically aligned.

sidebar-alignment.name: Sidebar Alignment
sidebar-alignment.hint: Choose which side of the screen the party sidebar should appear on.

sidebar-offset-x.name: Horizontal Offset (X)
sidebar-offset-x.hint: Adjust the horizontal position of the sidebar (in pixels).

sidebar-offset-y.name: Vertical Offset (Y)
sidebar-offset-y.hint: Adjust the vertical position of the sidebar (in pixels).

show-hover-details.name: Enable Hover Details
show-hover-details.hint: Show health and armor class details when hovering over a portrait.

show-hover-hp.name: Show HP on Hover
show-hover-hp.hint: Include current and maximum health in the hover details.

show-hover-ac.name: Show AC on Hover
show-hover-ac.hint: Include armor class in the hover details.

show-inspiration.name: Show Inspiration / Hero Points
show-inspiration.hint: Display a glowing icon on the character portrait if they have inspiration (5e) or hero points (pf2e).

low-health-pulse.name: Low Health Pulse
low-health-pulse.hint: If enabled, characters with low health will have a pulsing red aura around their portrait.

enable-chat-bubbles.name: Enable Chat Bubbles
enable-chat-bubbles.hint: Display chat bubbles next to character portraits when they speak in chat.

show-only-chat.name: Only Regular Chat
show-only-chat.hint: If enabled, only regular chat messages (OOC, IC, Emote, Whisper) will trigger chat bubbles, ignoring rolls and item usage.

chat-bubble-duration.name: Chat Bubble Duration
chat-bubble-duration.hint: How long (in seconds) the chat bubbles remain visible next to the portraits.

sidebar-collapsed.name: Collapse Party UI
sidebar-collapsed.hint: If enabled, the party UI collapses to a small handle on the edge of the screen and expands only when hovered.

yugen-modifiers-integration.name: Show Token Hover Details
yugen-modifiers-integration.hint: If yugen-modifiers is active, hovering over portraits will display the detailed token tooltip (health, gear, weapons, effects).

hide-in-combat.name: Hide During Combat
hide-in-combat.hint: If enabled, the party HUD will be hidden when combat is active.

chat-bubble-theme.name: Chat Bubble Theme
chat-bubble-theme.hint: Choose the visual style for chat bubbles.

enable-custom-pause.name: Enable Custom Pause Screen
enable-custom-pause.hint: Display a stylized custom pause overlay when the game is paused.

always-show-on-pause.name: Always Show When Paused
always-show-on-pause.hint: Automatically show the expanded custom pause overlay whenever the game is paused. If disabled, it starts collapsed.

pause-stats-list.name: Pause Menu Stats
pause-stats-list.hint: A comma-separated list of stats to show. Can use presets (str, dex, con, int, wis, cha, hp, ac) or custom syntax: 'Label:path.to.property:color-bar' (e.g. 'Mana:system.attributes.mana:int-bar').

resources-hide-ui.name: Hide Floating Bar
resources-hide-ui.hint: If enabled, the floating party resources bar is hidden.

resources-opacity.name: UI Opacity
resources-opacity.hint: The transparency of the floating resources bar.

resources-scale.name: UI Scale
resources-scale.hint: The size of the floating resources bar.

resources-offset-x.name: Horizontal Offset (X)
resources-offset-x.hint: Horizontal position adjustment (in pixels) from the center.

resources-offset-y.name: Vertical Offset (Y)
resources-offset-y.hint: Vertical position adjustment (in pixels) from the bottom.

resources-container-actor-id.name: Party Container
resources-container-actor-id.hint: The name or ID of the shared party container (can be a Loot Actor, a Container Item, or a Token on the scene). If found, the backpack button opens its sheet; otherwise, it opens the resource viewer.

config.title: yugen-party
config.icon-placeholder: Icon class or image path (e.g., fas fa-coins)
